Localization.Description: An AXFR request from an untrusted DNS server. With this request, attackers can disclose the internal structure of the network and gain access to confidential information.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Zone {object.value} was transferred via TCP AXFR request to untrusted host {dst.host} from domain DNS server {event_src.host}
The transfer of zone {object.value} via TCP AXFR request to untrusted host {dst.host} from domain DNS server {event_src.host} was prohibited
